sentences.arabic: يَتَطَوَّرُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ بِشَكْلٍ سَرِيعٍ جِدًّا فِي الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Vještačka inteligencija se veoma brzo razvija u svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Artificial intelligence is developing very quickly in the world.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ الشَّرِكَاتُ هَذِهِ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ الْخِدْمَاتِ وَتَوْفِيرِ الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Kompanije koriste ovu tehnologiju za poboljšanje usluga i uštedu vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Companies use this technology to improve services and save time.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْحَاسُوبِ الْآنَ أَنْ يَتَعَلَّمَ وَيَحُلَّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةَ.
sentences.translation: Računar sada može učiti i rješavati teške probleme.
sentences.translationEn: Computers can now learn and solve difficult problems.
